chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI H.C.A. No.391 of 2022 Commissioner Inland Revenue, Legal Versus M/s J.S. Global Capital Ltd. Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on office objection a/w reply as at “A” 2. For orders on CMA 710/23 3. For hearing of main case. 4. For orders on CMA 711/23 Dated: 19.02.2024 Mr. Nadir Hussain holds brief for Mr. Irfan Mir Halepota for appellant. -.-.- Ever since this appeal was filed office objections have not been complied. For the first time on 28.11.2022 one week time was granted for compliance followed by order of 10.02.2023 when again a week’s time was granted. Today counsel holding brief for appellant’s counsel is totally unaware about the office objections. In the circumstances, appeal is dismissed for non-prosecution along with listed applications. Judge Judge
